violations.title: Function shall have prototype
violations.description: Functions shall have prototype-form declarations with explicit parameter lists.
violations.explanation: Use an explicit parameter list so the function prototype is fully specified.

metadata.rationale: Explicit parameter lists prevent implicit function interfaces and make type checking reliable.
